name: Vault
author: Misty
overview: Vault provides encrypted, deduplicated backups powered by restic. It is packaged as a plugin so backup workflows can evolve independently from Misty core.
capabilities: Host Vault backup controls in Dock
Keep restic-specific setup and restore UX outside Misty core
Prepare a dedicated surface for future backup scheduling and repository management
permissions: Future filesystem read access for selected backup roots
Future shell access to run restic
getting_started: Use the plugin launcher to open Vault.
Configure restic repositories once the Vault plugin grows beyond its placeholder panel.
changelog: v0.1.0 - Moved Vault out of core and into a Dock-targeted plugin placeholder.
